title: Gudavi Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Gudavi Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Gudavi Bird Sanctuary is a tourist destination in Malenadu region of Karnataka, Sanctuary is spread over an area of 0.74 square km.
overview.description: Gudavi Bird Sanctuary is a tourist destination in Malenadu region of Karnataka, Sanctuary is spread over an area of 0.74 square km. It is part of Soraba Taluk of Shivamogga district in Karnataka. As per a 2009 survey, 217 different species of birds belonging to 48 families are found at this place. A natural lake and the trees gives shelter to these birds.

topPlaces.name: Chandragutti Renukamba Temple
topPlaces.description: Chandragutti Renukamba Temple located at Shivamogga district is a Hindu temple dedicated to goddess Renuka. This is an ancient cave temple.

topPlaces.name: Yelasi
topPlaces.description: Yelasi is a small village in Sorab Taluk in Shimoga district of Karnataka state, India. It belongs to the Bangalore division.

topPlaces.name: Aigod
topPlaces.description: Aigod is a village in the state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Siddapur taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gudavi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gudavi Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gudavi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gudavi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gudavi Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gudavi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Gudavi Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gudavi Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chandragutti Renukamba Temple, Yelasi, Aigod.
